data.content:
Implemented on branch `foolery-5a78`.
- Removed the redundant static Escalations action button from `ActionButton` when `beatsView === "finalcut"`; the action slot now renders empty for that view.
- Added a unit test asserting `ActionButton` returns `null` for the finalcut view.
- Validation: `bun run test -- src/components/__tests__/app-header-parts.test.ts`, `bun run lint` (passes with an existing warning in `src/components/beat-form.tsx:368`), `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run build`.
- Commit: `835f1b3705f3
